title: 🥇 Growth (E-Commerce)
description: Demo guide — a gold-layer Data Mart: a thin SQL base enriched entirely through Joinable Data Marts.

definition.sqlQuery:
SELECT date, session_id, visitor_id,
         traffic_source_id, country_id, cus

fields.name: date
fields.description: The calendar date when the session occurred.

fields.name: session_id
fields.description: Unique identifier for an individual web or app session.

fields.name: visitor_id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the anonymous visitor or browser.
